page_metadata.biotools__summary: The package is able to read bead-level data (raw TIFFs and text files) output by BeadScan as well as bead-summary data from BeadStudio.  Methods for quality assessment and low-level analysis are provided.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The package is able to read bead-level data (raw TIFFs and text files) output by BeadScan as well as bead-summary data from BeadStudio.  Methods for quality assessment and low-level analysis are provided.
